heroSubtitle: I hope today brings you as much joy as you give to everyone around you.
introText: Another year older, and somehow you keep getting better. I wanted to make something a little different for your birthday this year.
Consider this a small reminder of how much you mean to me, and to everyone lucky enough to have you in their lives.

reasons.title: Your Energy
reasons.desc: The way you instantly light up any room you walk into.

reasons.title: Your Humor
reasons.desc: You always know how to make me laugh, even on my worst days.

reasons.title: Your Drive
reasons.desc: Seeing you work hard for your goals is genuinely inspiring.

reasons.title: Your Heart
reasons.desc: You care deeply about your friends, and it shows.

reasons.title: Your Style
reasons.desc: Effortlessly cool, no matter what you wear.

reasons.title: Your Friendship
reasons.desc: Just knowing I can count on you means everything.

seasons.name: Spring
seasons.message: A new chapter begins today. I hope this year brings you closer to what you want.

seasons.name: Summer
seasons.message: Here is to more sunny days, random trips, and memories we will not forget.

seasons.name: Autumn
seasons.message: Even as things change, I love seeing the person you are becoming.

seasons.name: Winter
seasons.message: Through the quiet moments, I hope you always feel surrounded by people who care about you.

secretCaption: here is to many more birthdays together.
seasonsHint: tap each season to discover its meaning
closingParagraph: Take a second today to just breathe and enjoy it. Eat too much cake, make a wish, and have a great time celebrating. You deserve a perfect birthday.

heroPreTitle: To my one and only one

reasons.title: Your Smile
reasons.desc: It lights up my entire world.

reasons.title: Your Heart
reasons.desc: So kind and full of love.

reasons.title: Your Kindness
reasons.desc: It lights up everyone around you.

seasons.name: Spring
seasons.message: Every spring reminds me of when we first met.

seasons.name: Summer
seasons.message: Long summer days spent by your side.

seasons.name: Autumn
seasons.message: Falling in love deeper each day.

seasons.name: Winter
seasons.message: You are my warmth in the coldest nights.

seasonsHint: tap each season to discover its meaning
closingParagraph: No matter where life takes us, know that somewhere in the universe, there is a garden blooming with every feeling I have ever held for you. You deserve the world. You deserve all the flowers. You deserve everything.

heroSubtitle: Every petal holds a whisper of how much you mean to me.
introText: In a world full of ordinary moments, you are the extraordinary one. The way you laugh, the way you care, the way you simply exist — it fills every corner of my world with something I never knew I needed.
These flowers are not enough. No words ever could be. But they carry every unspoken feeling I hold for you, pressed between their petals like tiny love letters waiting to be found.

reasons.title: Your Laugh
reasons.desc: The sound that makes every room feel like home.

reasons.title: Your Patience
reasons.desc: How you wait for me even when I take too long.

reasons.title: Your Kindness
reasons.desc: The way you care without ever being asked.

reasons.title: Your Courage
reasons.desc: How you face the world even on the hardest days.

reasons.title: Your Warmth
reasons.desc: The feeling of being next to you on a quiet night.

reasons.title: Your Presence
reasons.desc: Just being with you is more than enough.

seasons.name: Spring
seasons.message: Like the first bloom after a long winter, you arrived when I least expected — and everything grew.

seasons.name: Summer
seasons.message: In the fullness of us, I felt the sun from the inside. No distance, no doubt — just warmth.

seasons.name: Autumn
seasons.message: Loving you through change taught me that some things don't need to stay the same to stay beautiful.

seasons.name: Winter
seasons.teaser: I stayed, and I'd stay again
seasons.message: In the quiet and the cold, I chose you still. I will always choose you still.

seasonsHint: tap each season to discover its meaning
closingParagraph: No matter where life takes us, know that somewhere in the universe, there is a garden blooming with every feeling I have ever held for you. You deserve the world. You deserve all the flowers. You deserve everything.
secretCaption: this is just for you — my favourite memory of us.
